creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Try to reinstall your glib20 to see if it helps. If not, then is the 
gio-querymodules in your /usr/local/bin/ at all? If not then you will need 
to figure why it doesn't install gio-querymodules and you also can send us 
a full log of glib20 reinstall.
